title: Chellame
subTitle: The seemingly unshakeable bonds within a joint family start to decline as the allure of money causes its members drift apart.

title: Chithi
subTitle: Kaveri's mother loses her life after falling into a river. As a result, Kaveri, who longs for her affection, forces her father to accept a different woman.

title: Arasi
subTitle: Conflicting ideals and moral dilemmas challenge Senthamizharase and Selvi while they confront intricate family bonds and societal demands.

title: Chanakya Thanthiram
subTitle: Chanakya, a philosopher and visionary strategist, joins hands with Chandragupta Maurya and becomes his chief advisor to save his empire.

title: Bayam Ariyaan
subTitle: Vinoth, an unemployed youth, is hired by Mithran, a corrupt policeman, to carry out illegal activities. However, problems arise when Vinoth decides to mend his ways after falling in love.

title: Vaadi Rasathi

title: Tenali Raman
subTitle: Tenali Raman, an advisor at the court of King Krishnadevaraya, uses his sharp presence of mind and wisdom to solve the difficult matters of the kingdom and its people daily.

title: Aladdin
subTitle: Aladdin, a poor thief, discovers a magical lamp containing a Genie. However, soon he realizes that Zafar, an evil sorcerer, also desires the lamp to rule over Baghdad.

title: Raja Rani
subTitle: A furious Vadivu humiliates Sembaruthi. Meanwhile, Karthik makes an important decision regarding Sembaruthi's marriage.

title: Aathmaan
subTitle: The Athipathy family tries to guard a sinister secret from everyone while running two successful businesses. However, things take a turn as the truth comes out.

title: Rustum
subTitle: Abhishek Bhargav, a police officer, decides to avenge the death of his friend, DCP Bharath. When his investigation lands him in Bengaluru, he discovers the roots of an organ trading mafia.
